'''Oplovis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Warlords" /> located in the [[Oplovis system/Legends|Oplovis system]], a part of the [[Oplovis sector/Legends|Oplovis sector]] in<ref name="EAOC" /> the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA Oplovis" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the point of origin of the fine material known as [[Oplovis linens]], and the [[Oplovian love poems]] [[Poet/Legends|composed]] by [[Sumi Zanthe]] were a part of classic literature.<ref name="Warlords" />

In [[48 BBY/Legends|48 BBY]],<ref name="Date">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which establishes [[Gaen Drommel]]'s age as 55, is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], and Drommel's [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] to [[48 BBY/Legends|48 BBY]].</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gaen Drommel]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Oplovis. Drommel went on to become an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|navy]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="WbC" /> When he was assigned the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Drommel dispatched his [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]], [[Gastos Niovi]], to personally pick up Oplovis linens from the admiral's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] for the latter's new quarters aboard the ''Guardian''. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="Warlords" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Drommel established his own [[Warlord/Legends|personal domain]] in the Oplovis [[Sector/Legends|sector]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> based in the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] surrounding his homeworld.<ref name="Warlords" />

==Behind the scenes==
Oplovis was first mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Oplovis [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square M-5.<ref name="TEA Oplovis" />
